code: import axios from"axios";const isAuthRoute=function(){let url=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:"";return url.includes("/auth/login");};const api=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"http://localhost:5000/api",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("authToken");if(token){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;}return config;},error=>Promise.reject(error));api.interceptors.response.use(response=>response,error=>{var _error$response,_error$config;if(((_error$response=error.response)===null||_error$response===void 0?void 0:_error$response.status)===401&&!isAuthRoute((_error$config=error.config)===null||_error$config===void 0?void 0:_error$config.url)){localStorage.removeItem("authToken");localStorage.removeItem("authUser");window.dispatchEvent(new Event("auth:unauthorized"));}return Promise.reject(error);});export default api;
